description: You are a county epidemiologist investigating a suspected Norovirus cluster linked to a catered event. Create a new Epi Info 7 project named 'NorovirusOutbreak' at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Epi Info 7\Projects\NorovirusOutbreak\ with a form named 'CaseInvestigation'. The form must include the following 15 fields with exact names and specified types: CaseID (Text), LastName (Text), FirstName (Text), Age (Number), Sex (Legal Values: Male, Female, Unknown), OnsetDate (Date), Nausea (Yes/No), Vomiting (Yes/No), Diarrhea (Yes/No), AbdCramps (Yes/No), Fever (Yes/No), AteChicken (Yes/No), AtePastaSalad (Yes/No), AteRolls (Yes/No), and DrankPunch (Yes/No). Ensure the project file NorovirusOutbreak.prj is saved to the specified directory.
